# float

Converts a value to a float. Does not work on strings - use [`parse_float`](#parse_float) for string parsing.

## Signature

`float(_var: any) -> float|error`

## Examples

```rad
float(42)      // -> 42.0
float(true)    // -> 1.0
float(false)   // -> 0.0  
float("3.14")  // -> Error: cannot convert string
```

## Category

parsing
